items.title_en: Tech investors loved this earnings season — but the Iran war is piling pressure on the companies powering the AI boom
items.title_zh: 科技投资者喜欢这个财报季，但伊朗战争给推动人工智能繁荣的公司带来了巨大压力
items.desc_en: Stocks continue to rally amid the AI boom, but the chip sector is scrambling to shore up access to key materials as costs rise.
items.desc_zh: 在人工智能热潮中，股市继续上涨，但随着成本上升，芯片行业正在争先恐后地增加对关键材料的获取。

items.title_en: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
items.title_zh: 渣打银行将削减超过 15% 的企业职能职位，以实现更高回报
items.desc_en: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.
items.desc_zh: 渣打银行将削减企业职能，并计划到 2028 年将每位员工的收入增加 20% 以上，以寻求更强劲的回报。

items.title_en: Gunmen kill 3 people at San Diego Islamic centre in suspected hate crime - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 圣地亚哥伊斯兰中心枪手涉嫌仇恨犯罪杀害 3 人 - 半岛电视台

items.title_en: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
items.title_zh: 韩国星巴克因“坦克日”促销引发争议而解雇首席执行官
items.desc_en: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.
items.desc_zh: 在许多人表示星巴克涉及血腥镇压后，星巴克撤回了其饮料杯的宣传活动。

items.title_en: Tasmanian government apologises over stolen body parts scandal
items.title_zh: 塔斯马尼亚政府就被盗尸体丑闻道歉
items.desc_en: An investigation found that 177 human specimens from dozens of bodies were secretly kept by a museum.
items.desc_zh: 调查发现，某博物馆秘密保存了数十具尸体的177具人体标本。

items.title_en: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice Department offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会、财政部和司法部向亿万富翁高塔姆·阿达尼提供法律救济
items.desc_en: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.
items.desc_zh: 美国财政部就阿达尼企业案达成和解，该案涉及 2023 年 11 月至 2025 年 6 月期间购买受制裁的伊朗能源。

items.title_zh: 圣地亚哥清真寺疑似仇恨犯罪致三人死亡

items.desc_zh: 调查人员称，其中一名青少年嫌疑人留下的一张纸条包含一般性的“仇恨言论”。

items.title_en: Putin heads to Beijing days after Trump in test of China's balancing act
items.title_zh: 特朗普几天后普京前往北京测试中国的平衡行为
items.desc_en: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.
items.desc_zh: 北京以更强硬的姿态参加峰会，而莫斯科则寻求保证中国在特朗普访问后没有倒向华盛顿。

items.title_en: Oil prices fall as Trump postpones Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
items.title_zh: 特朗普推迟伊朗袭击，油价下跌，缓解供应中断担忧
items.desc_en: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，应中东主要领导人的要求，他将推迟对伊朗的军事打击计划，随后油价下跌。

items.title_en: Japan's economy grows at annualized 2.1% rate in first quarter, beating expectations
items.title_zh: 日本经济第一季度年率增长2.1%，超出预期
items.desc_en: The figure beat projections of 0.4% from Reuters-polled economists, and against the 0.3% in the last quarter.
items.desc_zh: 这一数字超出了路透社调查的经济学家预测的 0.4%，也高于上一季度的 0.3%。

items.title_en: Asia markets open broadly higher as oil eases after Trump delays planned Iran strike
items.title_zh: 特朗普推迟计划的伊朗袭击后，油价下跌，亚洲市场普遍开盘走高
items.desc_en: Asia-Pacific markets opened broadly higher on Tuesday, amid lower oil prices after President Donald Trump said he is postponing a scheduled attack on Iran
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示他将推迟对伊朗的袭击，导致油价下跌，亚太市场周二普遍开盘走高

items.title_en: These chip stocks could extend historic gains by rallying over 110%, according to Nomura
items.title_zh: 野村证券 (Nomura) 表示，这些芯片股可能会上涨 110% 以上，延续历史涨幅
items.desc_en: Surging structural demand for memory in AI applications are likely to keep profitability high for chip stocks.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能应用中内存结构性需求的激增可能会使芯片股的盈利能力保持在较高水平。

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session

items.desc_en: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite closed lower for a second session on Monday as the tech sector slid. Shares of Micron Technology lost nearly 6%.
items.desc_zh: 随着科技股下滑，标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数周一连续第二个交易日收低。美光科技股价下跌近6%。

items.title_en: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他应海湾国家的要求取消了新的伊朗袭击
items.desc_en: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，他将推迟美国计划于周二发动的袭击，因为“目前正在进行认真的谈判”。

items.title_en: Trump says he's postponing 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Middle East leaders' request
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，应中东领导人的要求，他将推迟“明天对伊朗发动的预定袭击”
items.desc_en: The U.S. and Iran are in a stalemate centered on the Strait of Hormuz, the global oil pathway whose closure due to the war has caused an energy supply shock.

items.title_zh: 特朗普政府在放弃税务诉讼后推出 17 亿美元基金来补偿他的盟友
items.desc_en: The settlement will go towards individuals who allege they were subjected to unfair investigations.
items.desc_zh: 和解协议将针对那些声称自己受到不公平调查的个人。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Retail stocks are ailing on fears about the U.S. consumer. Will these earnings change that?
items.title_zh: 由于对美国消费者的担忧，零售股表现不佳。这些收入会改变这种情况吗？
items.desc_en: Pivots to consumer staples from discretionary are standard when warning signs start to flash.
items.desc_zh: 当警告信号开始闪现时，从非必需品转向消费必需品是标准做法。

items.title_en: Elon Musk loses court battle against Sam Altman and OpenAI after 3-week trial
items.title_zh: 经过三周的审判后，埃隆·马斯克在与萨姆·奥尔特曼和 OpenAI 的法庭诉讼中败诉
items.desc_en: The jury ruled in favor of Sam Altman and OpenAI in their dramatic court battle with Elon Musk.
items.desc_zh: 在 Sam Altman 和 OpenAI 与埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 激烈的法庭斗争中，陪审团做出了有利于他们的裁决。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Death toll from Israeli strikes on Lebanon passes 3,000, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击造成的死亡人数已超过 3000 人
items.desc_en: It marks a grim milestone in the conflict between Israel and the Lebanese armed group Hezbollah since March, despite a nominal ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 尽管名义上停火，但这标志着以色列和黎巴嫩武装组织真主党自三月以来冲突中的一个严峻里程碑。

items.title_en: Judge rules gun and writings are admissible in Luigi Mangione's New York murder trial
items.title_zh: 法官裁定枪支和文字在路易吉·曼吉奥内纽约谋杀案审判中可以接受
items.desc_en: Other items found with Mangione at a Pennsylvania McDonald's will not be allowed to be presented in court, the judge ruled.
items.desc_zh: 法官裁定，在宾夕法尼亚州麦当劳发现的与 Mangione 一起的其他物品将不允许出庭。

items.title_en: Two men arrested over stunt at enclosure of famous monkey Punch
items.title_zh: 两名男子因在著名猴子潘奇的圈地表演特技而被捕
items.desc_en: Two US nationals have been arrested after one jumped the fence of the monkey, who went viral online, police say.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，两名美国公民因跳下这只猴子的栅栏而被捕，这只猴子在网上疯传。

items.title_en: Lululemon takes battle with Chip Wilson public, calls founder 'misguided' and 'outdated'
items.title_zh: Lululemon 与 Chip Wilson 公开交锋，称创始人“被误导”且“过时”
items.desc_en: Lululemon responded publicly to founder Chip Wilson's campaign in a letter to shareholders, where it urged them to vote in its favor at its annual meeting.
items.desc_zh: Lululemon 在致股东的一封信中公开回应了创始人 Chip Wilson 的竞选活动，敦促股东在年度大会上投票支持 Lululemon。

items.title_en: Meta layoffs starting this week stress harsh AI reality inside Zuckerberg’s company
items.title_zh: 本周开始的大规模裁员凸显了扎克伯格公司内部严峻的人工智能现实
items.desc_en: Meta is starting layoffs this week, with 8,000 jobs expected to be cut, as employees brace for a new era of AI.
items.desc_zh: Meta 将于本周开始裁员，预计将裁员 8,000 人，员工将迎接人工智能新时代。

items.title_en: Shakira wins £50m tax refund from Spanish government
items.title_zh: 夏奇拉从西班牙政府获得 5000 万英镑退税
items.desc_en: The Colombian singer says the court ruling means the "narrative" that she was guilty now "crumbles".
items.desc_zh: 这位哥伦比亚歌手表示，法院的裁决意味着她有罪的“叙述”现在“崩溃”了。

items.title_en: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫发现失踪意大利潜水员尸体
items.desc_en: The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 官员告诉英国广播公司，上周在马尔代夫死亡的五名意大利潜水员的尸体现已全部找到。

items.title_en: Strike over high fuel prices paralyses transport in Kenya
items.title_zh: 高油价引发的罢工导致肯尼亚交通瘫痪
items.desc_en: Key roads have remained largely empty and some schools have asked students to stay at home.
items.desc_zh: 主要道路基本上仍然空无一人，一些学校要求学生呆在家里。

items.title_en: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola during DR Congo outbreak
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国爆发期间至少有六名美国人接触埃博拉病毒
items.desc_en: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.
items.desc_zh: 据媒体报道，据信接触过病毒的六名美国人中的一名正在出现症状。

items.title_en: UAE restores power to Barakah nuclear plant after drone strike, says IAEA – as it happened - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 国际原子能机构表示，阿联酋在无人机袭击后恢复了巴拉卡核电站的供电——事实确实如此——《卫报》
items.desc_en: UAE restores power to Barakah nuclear plant after drone strike, says IAEA – as it happened  The GuardianUAE and Saudi Arabia report drone incidents as Iran war deadlock drags on  ReutersDrone strikes
items.desc_zh: 国际原子能机构表示，阿联酋在无人机袭击后恢复了巴拉卡核电站的供电——正如所发生的那样

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_zh: Kirki
items.desc_en: WordPress finally has a freeform canvas website builder.
items.desc_zh: WordPress 终于有了一个自由格式的画布网站构建器。

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.desc_en: Your Chief Agent Operator for multi-agent work
items.desc_zh: 您的多代理工作首席代理操作员

items.title_en: QuickRight
items.title_zh: QuickRight
items.desc_en: The missing right-click features for macOS Finder
items.desc_zh: macOS Finder 缺少右键单击功能

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.title_en: Agentspan
items.title_zh: Agentspan
items.desc_en: Open-source runtime for durable AI agents
items.desc_zh: 持久人工智能代理的开源运行时

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。
